file: ANCE00199S103_What are the Different Types of Coronary Artery Bypass Graft (CABG) Procedures_.mp4
title: ANCE00199S103 What are the Different Types of Coronary Artery Bypass Graft (CABG) Procedures
text_en: During a conventional bypass surgery, your surgeon begins by making an incision in the skin over your breastbone or sternum. He or she will then cut the sternum and move your ribcage in order to get to your heart.

file: ANCE00199S103_What are the Different Types of Coronary Artery Bypass Graft (CABG) Procedures_.mp4
title: ANCE00199S103 What are the Different Types of Coronary Artery Bypass Graft (CABG) Procedures
text_en: Throughout the procedure, your circulatory system may be connected to a cardiopulmonary bypass pump or heart lung machine.

file: ANCE00199S103_What are the Different Types of Coronary Artery Bypass Graft (CABG) Procedures_.mp4
title: ANCE00199S103 What are the Different Types of Coronary Artery Bypass Graft (CABG) Procedures
text_en: When the surgeon chooses to do the surgery without using the heart lung machine, the heart continues to beat. This may be referred to as off-pump bypass surgery or minimally invasive surgery. Instead, a mechanical device is used to steady the part of the heart where the grafting is being done.

file: ANCE00199S103_What are the Different Types of Coronary Artery Bypass Graft (CABG) Procedures_.mp4
title: ANCE00199S103 What are the Different Types of Coronary Artery Bypass Graft (CABG) Procedures
text_en: Surgeons perform minimally invasive bypass procedures using specially designed instruments inserted through small incisions or ports in the chest.
